# Harmonia

> Unified self-hosted media platform. One system, two deployment targets.

Rust workspace (backend) + Tauri desktop app + Android/Kotlin player. Music, audiobooks, podcasts — unified library management with gapless playback, ReplayGain, and multi-device sync.

## Documentation

- [CLAUDE.md](CLAUDE.md): Project conventions
- [docs/PROJECT.md](docs/PROJECT.md): Project plan and architecture overview
- [docs/VISION.md](docs/VISION.md): Product vision
- [docs/architecture/](docs/architecture/): Architecture documents
- [standards/STANDARDS.md](standards/STANDARDS.md): Coding standards
